home.title: Zhihu Archive Station
home.subtitle: A full-screen terminal workbench for scraping, archiving and retrieval
home.hint.enter: Press Enter to generate a draft, then Ctrl+R to execute.
home.hint.retry: Press Ctrl+Y to load failed items from the last run as a retry draft.
home.hint.legacy: Legacy Rich / questionary flow is still available: zhihu interactive --legacy
draft.idle.title: Waiting for Input
draft.idle.line1: Supports answer, question, and column URLs. Can also extract from mixed text.
draft.idle.line2: Press Enter to generate a draft; then Ctrl+R to execute the archive.
draft.no_url.title: No Zhihu URL Detected
draft.no_url.line1: Please paste an answer, question page, or column URL.
draft.no_url.line2: If pasting a block of text, the app will auto-extract Zhihu URLs.
draft.question.title: Question Page Detected
draft.question.hint: This is not a single answer. Please choose how many answers to preview.
draft.question.options: Options: Top 3, Top 20, or a custom integer.
draft.question.top_hint: For question pages, defaults to Top 3 answers per question.
draft.multi.title: Multi-URL Draft Staged
draft.ready.title: Archive Draft Ready
draft.confirm_exec: Press Ctrl+R to execute the current draft.
draft.question_updated.title: Question Draft Updated
draft.running.title: Archiving {current}/{total}
draft.running.locked: Input is locked during execution and will restore on completion.
draft.done.title: Archive Complete
draft.partial.title: Archive Partially Complete
draft.failed.title: Archive Failed
draft.done.remaining: {count} more targets completed; a full result panel is coming in a future release.
type.question: Question
summary.extra: {count} more URLs also added to the current draft queue.
summary.extra_seq: {count} more URLs detected; this run will process them in order.
queue.empty.title: Queue Empty
queue.empty.line1: Paste a URL and press Enter to populate this queue.
queue.empty.line2: Multiple URLs will be processed sequentially.
queue.title: Draft Queue
queue.remaining: {count} more targets remain in the draft.
history.empty.title: No Recent Results
history.empty.line1: Run an archive first; output paths and failure summaries will appear here.
history.empty.line2: If the last run has failures, press Ctrl+Y to load a retry draft.
history.title: Recent Results
history.retry_hint: Press Ctrl+Y to retry failed items from the last run.
retry.title: Retry Draft for Failed Items
retry.summary: Generated {count} targets from the last run's failures.
retry.extra: {count} more failed targets also added to this retry draft.
detail.exec.title: Execution Details
detail.exec.empty: No details for the last run yet.
detail.exec.retry_hint: Failed items can be reloaded as a draft via Ctrl+Y.
detail.draft.title: Draft Details
detail.draft.pending: Waiting for question page count selection.
detail.draft.ready: Draft is ready. Press Ctrl+R to execute.
detail.idle.title: Workbench Details
detail.idle.line1: Target details for the current draft or detailed results from the last run.
detail.idle.line2: When failures exist, error summaries and log tails will be shown here.
app.busy.title: Task Still Running
app.busy.line1: The current archive has not finished. Please wait.
app.busy.line2: Only one run at a time; concurrent execution is not supported.
app.busy.retry_line1: Cannot switch to a retry draft while the current run is active.
app.busy.retry_line2: Wait for the current run to finish, then load failed items.
app.busy.quit_line1: A background task is still running; cannot exit yet.
app.busy.quit_line2: Wait for the archive to complete before quitting.
app.need_config.title: Complete Question Config First
app.need_config.line1: The current draft is missing the answer count for the question page.
app.need_config.line2: Choose Top 3, Top 20, or enter a custom number before executing.
app.no_draft.title: No Executable Draft
app.no_draft.line1: Paste a Zhihu URL and press Enter to generate a draft first.
app.no_draft.line2: The workbench supports real execution, recent results, and failure retry.
app.no_retry.title: No Retryable Results
app.no_retry.line1: Run at least one archive first; the results panel will show failures.
app.no_retry.line2: The retry entry depends on the most recent execution report.
app.no_failures.title: No Failures in Last Run
app.no_failures.line1: The last run succeeded completely; no retry draft needed.
app.no_failures.line2: You can paste new URLs or execute a new draft.
app.cancel_question.title: Question Config Cancelled
app.cancel_question.line1: The question page draft has no answer count set.
app.cancel_question.line2: Re-submit the URL to choose Top 3, Top 20, or a custom number.
app.crash.title: Archive Task Crashed
app.crash.line2: This is not a target-level failure; the execution bridge itself broke.
app.quit_blocked.title: Archive in Progress
toast.draft_created: Draft generated — press Ctrl+R to execute!
toast.draft_created.title: Parsed
toast.task_started.title: Task Started
toast.task_success.title: Success
toast.task_partial.title: Has Failures
toast.task_failed.title: Task Failed
lang_selector.title: 🌍 Worldwide
lang_selector.hint: Your selection will be saved as the default language
